violations.description: Root user should not have access keys
violations.recommendation: Delete root access keys and use IAM users with appropriate permissions

violations.description: S3 bucket should not allow public write access
violations.recommendation: Remove public write permissions immediately. Use pre-signed URLs for temporary write access

violations.description: S3 bucket should have encryption enabled
violations.recommendation: Enable AES-256 or AWS-KMS encryption for data at rest
